title: SOL 18pk Mini Gel Air Fresheners - Strong Bathroom Air Fresheners Multipack for Home, Kitchen, Gym Locker, Office, Long-Lasting Fresh Scent Gel
features: Experience Freshness Everywhere – Enjoy 18 air fresheners, each 71 ml, giving you a total of 1278 ml of long-lasting fragrance. Discover zesty raspberry in the kitchen, invigorating pacific surf in the bathroom, and soothing lavender meadow in the living room, crafted to bring a beautifully fresh ambiance to every corner of your home.
Continuous, Long-Lasting Freshness – Our gel air fresheners provide a steady, revitalizing aroma to keep your space energized and fresh for extended periods.
Uplift Your Senses – Let the vibrant scents of our air fresheners transform your home into an uplifting oasis, adding a touch of positivity to every room.
On-the-Go Freshness – Compact and portable, these mini air fresheners deliver consistent bursts of fragrance, keeping any space fresh and inviting, wherever you are.
Enduring Freshness in Every Breath – With our cupboard air fresheners, enjoy an enduring, refreshing fragrance that brightens your mood. Plus, receive a FREE SOL Sticker with your purchase!

The pack includes zesty raspberry for the kitchen, pacific surf for the bathroom, and calming lavender meadow for the living room. How long does the fragrance last? Our gel air fresheners provide long-lasting freshness, continuously invigorating your space with a vibrant aroma. Can I use these air fresheners in different settings? Yes, these air fresheners are versatile and suitable for any space, including your home, gym locker, office, or car. How do I maintain freshness when on the go? Simply take the mini air fresheners with you to enjoy a continuous burst of uplifting fragrance wherever you are. What are the dimensions of each air freshener? Each air freshener tub measures 5.8 x 4 x 7 cm and weighs approximately 71g, making it compact and easy to place anywhere.
